title: Gin’s Loyalty Breaks Under Krieg’s Cruelty
scene: On pages 5–8, the Baratie conflict focuses on Luffy, Sanji, Don Krieg, Gin, Zeff. Sanji leaves the restaurant behind, joining Luffy’s crew while the cooks hide their emotions behind insults.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: We couldn't catch up with Sister Nami but judging from the way she was headed,

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: We're pretty sure we know where she's headed.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Oh good. Then let's go and bring her back.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Well Umm... if she's headed to where we think she's headed to,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Then it's an incredibly dangerous place...!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Well, I'll fill you in on the details later!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: In any case, we need your strength, bro!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Please come right away!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: OK! I don't know what's going on,

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: But fine! Let's go!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Wait.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I'll go too.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Take me with you.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: What!?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Sanji...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I'll accompany you on your way to becoming the pirate King.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: After all, we both have crazy dreams.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: So I'll tag Arlong to fulfill mine.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: I'll be the cook for your ship.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Sound Good?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Or bad?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Sounds great!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Woohoo!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Alright, brother Luffyy!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Yeah!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: That's how it's gonna be, guys.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Sorry for all the trouble I put you through.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: HMPF, I don't like it one bit!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I wanted to throw you outta here with my own two hands,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: But now you decide to leave on your own?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Sorry for making you put on that shitty performance.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What!? You knew!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I could hear you crystal clear from outside, you numbskulls.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: So... you wanted to kick me out that badly, huh?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Is that right, you damn geezer?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Why the hell do you always have to talk like that!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Hmph.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: That's exactly right, lil' eggplant. I've always hated brats.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: There hasn't been a single day when I didn't regret saving a brat like you.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Ha...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Whatever you say, Geezer.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Enjoy the few years you have left.

summary: This part keeps the Baratie battle centered on willpower, debt, hunger, and pride. The dialogue shows who still stands firm after Krieg’s violence and who is ready to break away from the restaurant’s old life.
